title: Bodhi's Sleepy Garden
synopsis: Follow little Bodhi as he explores his garden at bedtime, discovering sleepy animals and gentle sounds that help him drift peacefully to sleep.

pages.text: Bodhi walks in his sleepy garden. Shh, shh, quiet time.

illustration.description: A sweet South Asian toddler boy with soft brown skin and dark curly hair wearing pale blue pajamas walks through a dreamy garden at twilight. Soft purple and pink sky with gentle stars beginning to twinkle. Garden has rounded flower shapes in pastel colors.
illustration.alt: Bodhi walking in garden at bedtime

pages.text: The flowers whisper whoosh, whoosh. Sleep tight, little flowers.

illustration.description: Close-up of large, friendly-faced flowers with sleepy expressions and closed petals in soft lavender and peach tones. Gentle breeze lines show movement. Bodhi's small hand reaches toward them with wonder.
illustration.alt: Sleepy flowers whispering in the breeze

pages.text: The bunny says yawn, yawn. Sleep tight, little bunny.

illustration.description: A fluffy white bunny with large drowsy eyes sits among soft grass, mouth open in a big yawn. Bodhi kneels nearby with a gentle smile. Warm golden light creates a cozy atmosphere with rounded, simple shapes.
illustration.alt: Sleepy bunny yawning in the garden

pages.text: The bird chirps tweet, tweet. Sleep tight, little bird.

illustration.description: A small yellow bird with sleepy half-closed eyes perches on a curved tree branch. Bodhi looks up with soft wonder. The tree has rounded leaves in gentle green tones. Peaceful twilight colors fill the background.
illustration.alt: Sleepy bird chirping softly on branch

pages.text: The bee hums buzz, buzz. Sleep tight, little bee.

illustration.description: A chubby, friendly bee with droopy wings and sleepy eyes rests on a large daisy. Bodhi watches with quiet curiosity. Soft yellow and white flower petals create a gentle bed for the tired bee.
illustration.alt: Sleepy bee humming on a daisy

pages.text: The cricket sings chirp, chirp. Sleep tight, little cricket.

illustration.description: A small green cricket with kind eyes sits on a broad leaf, making gentle music. Bodhi sits cross-legged nearby, listening peacefully. Soft moonlight bathes the scene in silvery-blue tones with warm highlights.
illustration.alt: Sleepy cricket chirping on a leaf

pages.text: The garden whispers hush, hush. Sleep tight, sweet Bodhi.

illustration.description: Bodhi lies curled up on soft grass surrounded by all his sleepy garden friends - the bunny, bird, bee, and cricket. Gentle stars twinkle overhead. Everything has a dreamy, peaceful quality with soft pastel colors blending together.
illustration.alt: Bodhi sleeping peacefully in the garden

illustration.description: A close-up of sleeping Bodhi with a content smile, surrounded by floating 'Z' letters in soft cloud shapes. His garden friends sleep peacefully nearby. Gentle night sky with twinkling stars creates a magical, restful scene.
illustration.alt: Everyone sleeping peacefully under the stars

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What does the bunny do?
questions.explanation: The bunny says yawn, yawn in the story.

questions.question: What sound does the bee make?
Where does Bodhi go to sleep?
questions.explanation: Bodhi falls asleep in his sleepy garden.

pages.text: The bunny says [BLANK], [BLANK]. Sleep tight, little bunny.
The [BLANK] hums buzz, buzz. Sleep tight, little [BLANK].
